questions.q: Write an article on the importance of conservation of wildlife in a forest ecosystem. Discuss the role of humans in conservation efforts and provide suggestions for individuals to contribute to the cause.
questions.answer: The conservation of wildlife is crucial for maintaining the balance of a forest ecosystem. Humans have a significant role to play in conservation efforts, and individual contributions can make a substantial difference. The importance of conservation lies in preserving biodiversity, maintaining ecosystem services, and ensuring the long-term health of the planet. Humans can contribute to conservation by reducing their carbon footprint, supporting organizations involved in conservation, and spreading awareness about the importance of conservation. Individuals can also make a difference by making eco-friendly choices, reducing waste, and participating in local conservation initiatives.
marking_scheme: Introduction to the topic (1 mark)
Discussion on the importance of conservation (1 mark)
Role of humans in conservation efforts (1 mark)
Suggestions for individual contributions (1 mark)
Conclusion (1 mark)

questions.q: Write an article on the impact of social media on relationships. Discuss the positive and negative effects of social media on personal relationships and provide suggestions for maintaining healthy relationships in the digital age.
questions.answer: Social media has revolutionized the way we communicate and interact with each other. While social media has made it easier to connect with people, it also has its downsides. The positive effects of social media on relationships include increased connectivity, improved communication, and enhanced social support. However, the negative effects include social comparison, decreased face-to-face interaction, and increased conflict. To maintain healthy relationships in the digital age, individuals can set boundaries, engage in face-to-face communication, and prioritize quality time with loved ones.
marking_scheme: Introduction to the topic (1 mark)
Discussion on the positive effects of social media (1 mark)
Discussion on the negative effects of social media (1 mark)
Suggestions for maintaining healthy relationships (1 mark)
Conclusion (1 mark)

questions.q: Write an article on the benefits of regular exercise for mental health. Discuss the physical and mental benefits of exercise and provide suggestions for incorporating physical activity into daily life.
questions.answer: Regular exercise is essential for maintaining good mental health. The physical benefits of exercise include improved cardiovascular health, increased strength and flexibility, and enhanced sleep quality. The mental benefits of exercise include reduced stress and anxiety, improved mood, and increased self-esteem. To incorporate physical activity into daily life, individuals can start with small, manageable goals, find an exercise routine that they enjoy, and schedule physical activity into their daily planner.
marking_scheme: Introduction to the topic (1 mark)
Discussion on the physical benefits of exercise (1 mark)
Discussion on the mental benefits of exercise (1 mark)
Suggestions for incorporating physical activity (1 mark)
Conclusion (1 mark)

questions.q: A school has 500 students, and the administration wants to start a newsletter. If 250 students have expressed interest in writing for the newsletter, and 100 students have expressed interest in designing the layout, what percentage of students are interested in contributing to the newsletter?
questions.answer:
Calculation:
Total number of students = 500
Number of students interested in writing = 250
Number of students interested in designing = 100
Total number of students interested in contributing = 250 + 100 = 350
Percentage of students interested in contributing = (350 / 500) * 100 = 70%
The percentage of students interested in contributing to the newsletter is 70%.
marking_scheme: Calculation of total number of students interested in contributing (2 marks)
Calculation of percentage of students interested in contributing (2 marks)
Presentation of final answer (1 mark)

questions.q: A magazine has 1000 subscribers, and the editor wants to increase the number of subscribers by 25%. How many new subscribers does the magazine need to gain?
questions.answer:
Calculation:
Current number of subscribers = 1000
Increase in subscribers = 25% of 1000 = 0.25 * 1000 = 250
Number of new subscribers needed = 250
The magazine needs to gain 250 new subscribers.
marking_scheme: Calculation of increase in subscribers (2 marks)
Calculation of number of new subscribers needed (2 marks)
Presentation of final answer (1 mark)

questions.q: A publisher has 5000 books in stock, and the company wants to reduce the stock by 15%. How many books does the publisher need to sell?
questions.answer:
Calculation:
Current stock of books = 5000
Reduction in stock = 15% of 5000 = 0.15 * 5000 = 750
Number of books to be sold = 750
The publisher needs to sell 750 books.
marking_scheme: Calculation of reduction in stock (2 marks)
Calculation of number of books to be sold (2 marks)
Presentation of final answer (1 mark)
